projects.name: blit
projects.notes: proto/blit.proto holds the gRPC definitions; blit-core's build script vendors protoc. Integration tests live per-crate (e.g. crates/blit-cli/tests/, crates/blit-core/tests/); the root Cargo.toml is a virtual workspace, so a root-level tests/ dir would never be compiled (w9-2 relocated the old one).

policy.code_changes: Run the full validation suite (fmt, clippy, test) before claiming completion or writing a review sentinel. Test count never drops versus the prior baseline unless the removal is called out in the finding doc.
policy.docs_only: Code verification is not required, but scripts/agent/check-docs.sh must pass before pushing docs changes.
policy.manual_behavior: Windows parity: after touching platform-specific code (win_fs, planners), run scripts/windows/run-blit-tests.ps1, or state clearly that it was not run.
policy.ci_gate: A push touching crates/** or proto/** must also touch docs/STATE.md unless a commit message contains [state: skip] (docs-gate.yml).

notes: State lives canonically in docs/STATE.md and decisions in docs/DECISIONS.md; .agents/state.md and .agents/decisions.md are pointer stubs only (AGENTS.md section 10 update rule). CI and hook scripts are wired to the docs/ paths.
DEVLOG.md is an append-only journal: write to it, never read it for current state. TODO.md is backlog-only.
Verification commands confirmed against AGENTS.md section 5, .review/README.md, and the CI workflows; not executed during the bootstrap run itself (docs-only change).
